pillars.name: Educate
pillars.description: Tips, tutorials, how-tos, and informative content that teaches your audience something valuable

pillars.name: Entertain
pillars.description: Fun, relatable, trending content that captures attention and encourages sharing

pillars.name: Inspire
pillars.description: Motivational stories, transformations, behind-the-scenes, and aspirational content

pillars.name: Promote
pillars.description: Product features, offers, testimonials, and direct calls to action

pillars.name: Community
pillars.description: User-generated content, Q&As, polls, reposts, and audience engagement content
